channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Fortnite players get a 10-minute sneak peek of The Mandalorian and Grogu on May 19
item.description: The movie officially hits theaters May 22.

item.title: Early Memorial Day TV deals are live at Samsung — up to $1,500 off top-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs
item.description: Samsung's early Memorial Day TV sale is live, and I have the best deals, including up to $1,500 off top-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
item.description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

item.title: Subsea cables are emerging as the new underwater battleground — these are the island nations most at risk from attacks
item.description: Island nations increasingly face internet blackout risks because fragile undersea cables remain exposed.

item.title: 'It's so much more than a standard desk fan' — I reviewed Meaco's upgraded Pro air circulator and was blown away by its power, silence and smarts
item.description: The MeacoFan Sefte Pro 10in Table Air Circulator is quiet, powerful and now comes with upgraded smarts.

item.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
item.description: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

item.title: Amazon is facing a class action lawsuit for not refunding its customers after 'unlawful' tariffs
item.description: The lawsuit claims that Amazon owes 'hundreds of millions' in refunds to its users.

item.title: Ce téléviseur TCL dépasse les 10 000 nits et défonce le plafond du HDR10
item.description: Un téléviseur TCL Mini-LED vient de franchir un palier que personne n'avait atteint sur un produit grand public : la barre des 10 000 nits. Mesure à l'appui, record certifié hors plafond du HDR10, mais à ce niveau de luminosité, le marketing prend une bonne longueur d'avance sur les usages réels.

item.title: Your next work PC could be about to get a major performance boost as Kioxia reveals its most powerful SSD, with PCIe 5.0 and read speeds of up to 14,000 MB/s
item.description: Kioxia unveils PCIe 5.0 XG10 SSD series, delivering faster speeds for AI workstations, creators, gaming systems, and professionals.

item.title: Terraria developer confirms cross-play is coming and teases 15th anniversary collector's items
item.description: The game has sold 70 million copies over its 15-year run, Re-Logic said.
